历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 24747 → 36841 → 28395 → 28583 → 31880, showing overall significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to adjustments in major groups, there was a substantial backward shift. In the recent three years, it has stabilized within the range of 28,000 to 32,000. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 31880. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 21 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 50 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 51, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, a small expansion of about 2%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 137th, with a slight decline in recent years (128 in 2024 → 134 in 2025 → 137 in 2026), overall at the upper-middle level nationwide. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 104th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms. There is no history of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no A-/A/A+ level disciplines appeared, indicating moderate overall disciplinary strength and limited additional appeal for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, matching well with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Software, Mechanical Engineering, etc.). In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province is about 204,000, an increase of about 6.1% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Ningxia University is located in the northwestern region, while Fujian Province is a southeastern coastal province. The long geographical distance for cross-province study may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 31880, the 2026 plan's small expansion of 2%, the approximately 6.1% increase in Fujian Physics Category examinees, and the slight decline in university ranking, competition overall slightly intensifies. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 32463, with a range of 31963 to 32963.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 31963 to 32963, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 31963), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer Science and Software Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., near 32963), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options and cautiously choose Tier 1 majors.
